title: sporobolus helvolus
intro: Sporobolus helvolus, also known as Yellow Indiangrass, is a species of grass native to the Great Plains region of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Sporobolus helvolus include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of skin conditions and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
